home.slogan: Drawn by little monsters. Worn by real folks.
home.subslogan: Designs made right here in Québec, by kids with more imagination than the rest of us.
home.programme_titre: Your child's drawing deserves to be worn.
home.programme_texte: The Little Artists program turns children's drawings into real collections. The artist gets a free shirt + a share of every sale.

boutique.sous_titre: The full collection, all in one place.
boutique.aucun_produit: Nothing here yet in this category — check back soon!

produit.partage_profits: of each sale is donated to

apropos.p1: You know those drawings your kid scribbles on paper and you're not sure what to do with them? We put them on clothes.
apropos.p2: Gaminet Gamin GG is a Québec-based shop that turns children's drawings into quality garments. Every design comes from a kid with a weird idea and zero fear of showing it.
apropos.p3: We're proud to do this right here in Québec — Made in Québec, no asterisk. Because kids' imaginations deserve better than a kitchen drawer.
apropos.mission_texte: Turn genius scribbles into clothes real people actually want to wear.
apropos.val1_texte: Designed, produced, and shipped from Québec.
apropos.val2_texte: Every drawing is unique — signed by its little artist.

artistes.titre: The little monsters behind the designs
artistes.sous_titre: These kids can't draw — and that's exactly why we love them.

contact.sous_titre: A question? A special order? A wild idea? We're listening.
contact.merci: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.

panier.vide: Your cart is empty — go shopping!

p_tits_artistes.hero_titre: Your child's drawing on a real garment.
p_tits_artistes.hero_sous_titre: We select children's drawings to print on our clothing. If we choose your kid's drawing, it becomes a real collection — they get a free shirt and a share of every sale.
p_tits_artistes.step1_texte: They draw whatever they want, however they want. A creature, a dinosaur, a rainbow with eyes — we welcome everything.
p_tits_artistes.step2_texte: Take a photo of the drawing and submit it using the form below. No artistic expertise required.
p_tits_artistes.step3_texte: If we select the drawing, it becomes a real collection. The artist gets a free shirt + a share of profits from every sale.
p_tits_artistes.cause_texte: For every sale of a community-submitted design, 10% is donated to a Québec youth organization of the child's choice.
p_tits_artistes.cause_note: The young artist can choose which of these three organizations receives their share if they'd rather donate than keep it.
p_tits_artistes.form_dessin: Photo of the drawing (JPG or PNG, max 10 MB)
p_tits_artistes.form_raconte_placeholder: What did they try to draw? (max 200 characters)
p_tits_artistes.form_consent1: I authorize this submission and confirm I am 18 years of age or older.
p_tits_artistes.form_consent2: I accept the terms and conditions of the Little Artists program.
p_tits_artistes.form_merci: Wow, we can't wait to see it! We'll get back to you within 4 to 6 weeks. 🎨
p_tits_artistes.form_erreur: Oops, something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
p_tits_artistes.gallery_sous_titre: Drawings selected by our team, submitted by the community.
p_tits_artistes.faq1_r: Children ages 4 to 14 residing in Canada. A parent or guardian must submit the form.
p_tits_artistes.faq2_q: Does my child keep the rights to their drawing?
p_tits_artistes.faq2_r: Absolutely. We only ask for a printing and sales license. Your child remains the owner of their artwork.
p_tits_artistes.faq3_q: How much does my child earn?
p_tits_artistes.faq3_r: 10% of each sale goes to the youth organization chosen by the child, paid by cheque or store credit at the parent's choice.
p_tits_artistes.faq4_q: How long until we hear back?
p_tits_artistes.faq4_r: We review all submissions and respond within 4 to 6 weeks. Thank you for your patience!
